narrative:
07 congressional district has 546,095 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 2.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +0.5% D−R vs -5.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
